_comment: miniVite distributed Louvain — 4 MPI ranks throughout.
Workload: -n 1000000 vertices (RGG), Louvain converges in ~10–15 iters at ~120s.
Checkpoint: hardcoded every 5 iterations in dspl.hpp:1361 (the -CP flag is parsed but ignored).
First checkpoint fires at iter 5, ~40s in.
miniVite_ckpt_<rank>.bin lands in cwd (= run_X/ via runner cwd-share).
Recovery:    on restart, simple_checkpoint.h::read_checkpoint loads numIters + currComm + clusterWeight.
small-low rationale: kill at 70s lands AFTER iter-5 checkpoint, BEFORE iter-10 checkpoint.
Restart loads iter-5 state and resumes from iter 5.

scenarios.name: small-low
scenarios._purpose: 1 failure injected at 70s — after iter-5 checkpoint; restart resumes from iter 5.
